title: Quentin Blake Santa Skating Medium Gift Bag Christmas - Gift Accessory 615535 by Woodmansterne
features: You are viewing: A Medium Christmas Gift Bag by Woodmansterne

Details: This eco-friendly gift bag from Woodmansterne's Quentin Blake range features a cheerful cartoon design of Santa Claus ice skating. It's the perfect way to present a Christmas gift and is sure to bring a smile to someone's face.
Good to know: This gift bag is made from paper, 100% plastic free and recyclable. It is presented with no packaging, making it an eco-friendly choice.
